name: @microsoft/mxc-sdk-win32-x64
description: MXC SDK native binaries for win32-x64 (x86_64-pc-windows-msvc).

scripts.prepack: node -e "if(!require('fs').existsSync('wxc-exec.exe')){console.error('prepack: wxc-exec.exe not staged; refusing to pack an empty platform package');process.exit(1)}"

author: Microsoft Corporation
